Resound (LAN Audio Receivers)

MVP: Host captures system audio via getDisplayMedia({ audio: true }), then sends it to multiple receivers using WebRTC+Opus.
Monitor Device:
Skip first channels (to avoid feedback)
Monitor Boost: 1.5x
Broadcast Boost: 3.0x
Session ID: not started
Idle

Receivers

Output Boost: 1.2x
Idle
